title: AZOTH Cobblemon Minimap Icons
description: Pokémon from Cobblemon: Iconified for JourneyMap and Xaero's Minimap!
body:
![A banner showcasing the Cobblemon style icons as they would appear on JourneyMap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60a086b3aef6cb9c3950ff3257813edb62a9a28c.png)

See Cobblemon as they were meant to be seen!

This Resource Pack adds Cobblemon-style icons for modeled Pokémon in either JourneyMap or Xaero's Minimap.

## Journeymap Guide ### Enable Pokémon Icons 1. Open the in-game menu and go to **Journeymap Settings** (`J` key by default). 2. Click **Options** from the button list on the lower part of your screen. 3. Select **Minimap Preset** or **Full Map Preset** depending on your preferences. 4. Set **Mob Display** → **Outlined Icons**. 5. Adjust **Entity Icon Size** as desired. ## Xaero’s Minimap Guide ### Enable Pokémon Icons 1. Open the in-game menu and go to **Xaero's Minimap Settings** (`Y` key by default). 2. Select **Entity Radar Settings**. 3. Change **Display Icons** to **Always**. 4. Adjust **Entity Icon Scale** as desired.

Disclaimer:
